title: Make Item Shine
description: This texture pack enhances the visual appeal of valuable in-game items by adding a glowing effect. It makes items like diamonds, golden apples, golden carrots, iron and gold ingots, nuggets, netherite ingots, and all swords shine
body:
That sounds like a great texture pack! Here's a short description with emojis: 

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8086bc12874b3875ccc1a96fa634398bdd903221.webp)

**✨ Shining Items Texture Pack for Minecraft 1.21.1**  

🔹 **Enhance your game with glowing treasures!** This texture pack adds a **shining effect** to valuable items like:  
💎 **Diamonds**  
🍏 **Golden Apples & Golden Carrots**  
⚔️ **All Swords**  
🔩 **Iron, Gold, and Netherite Ingots & Nuggets**  

Perfect for players who love **extra shine and detail** in their items! ✨
